## Checklist

- [ ] Matches `docs/shaxda_prd.md`.

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.
- [ ] Diff is small and reviewable.
